ddls:
CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "from_visit" INTEGER /* ID of the previous visit if the current visit is a referral (0 if not a referral) */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the place visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the visit */,
  "visit_type" INTEGER /* Type of the visit (e.g., 1 for organic, 5 for referral, 6 for direct) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the visit occurred */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the visit (in seconds or minutes) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the visit */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string to identify the browser and operating system used */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the referral (e.g., Google, Facebook) if the visit is a referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_visit_type FOREIGN KEY ("visit_type") REFERENCES visit_types ("visit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "places" (
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each place */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the place */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the place (e.g., Restaurant, Park) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the place */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the place */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the place */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the place based on user reviews */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_places_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES place_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_types" (
  "visit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit type */,
  "visit_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the visit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visit type */,
  "is_external" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the visit type is external (e.g., referral from a different domain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the session start */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the session end */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string to identify the browser and operating system used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the session (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user for demographic analysis */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user for demographic analysis */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the preference */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., language, theme) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., English, Dark) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the preference is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "place_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each place category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the place category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the place category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category to support hierarchical categories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "is_mobile" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the device is a mobile device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
